name: Person-Moment Music
tagline: A privacy-first way to turn personal moments into validated music specs.
thesis: Capture a private moment, convert it into a safe structured music specification, render playable audio, and share only what the user approves.
audience: Creators, memory keepers, music-curious consumers, and social sharing users.
proofPoints: Raw journal text stays private by default.
MusicSpec JSON is validated before audio generation.
Distribution centers on moments rather than playlist catalog behavior.
